research.deliverables: Executive Summary → Market Overview → Target Audience → Key Opportunities → Key Risks → Strategic Recommendations → Next Steps
instructions: DO NOT ask for more information. You have everything you need.
DO NOT return a template or framework. Return actual research content.
Write as a senior analyst with deep domain knowledge.
Use real market dynamics, demographics, competitive context.
Minimum 600 words. Target 1000-2000 for standard tasks.
Start directly with content — no preamble.

revenue.deliverables: Core Offer, Value Stack, Pricing Strategy, Risk Reversal, Monetization Path, LTV Expansion, and Revenue Projections
instructions: Be specific and actionable. Use real numbers and frameworks.
Do NOT return JSON. Return a well-structured markdown document.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
revenue.output_format: Professional revenue strategy report in markdown format.

sales.deliverables: Sales Narrative, Identity-Based Hook, Emotional Open Loop, Mechanism Explanation, Objection Handling, Authority Positioning, Call-To-Action Structure, Follow-Up Sequence, Close Script, Urgency Drivers
instructions: Be specific. Use proven sales psychology and real frameworks.
Do NOT return JSON. Return a well-structured markdown document.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
sales.output_format: Professional sales strategy report in markdown format.

growth.deliverables: ICP Refinement, Channel Strategy, Traffic Sources, Funnel Strategy, Content Angles, Paid Acquisition, Organic Leverage, Authority Positioning, Compounding Growth Loops, and Scaling Roadmap
instructions: Be specific. Include concrete tactics, not just concepts.
Do NOT return JSON. Return a well-structured markdown document.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
growth.output_format: Professional growth strategy report in markdown format.

legal.deliverables: Risk Exposure Map, Regulatory Touchpoints, Required Disclaimers, Jurisdiction Sensitivities, Marketing Claim Boundaries, High-Risk Language, Client Suitability Warnings, Compliance Structure, Liability Reduction, and Documentation Checklist
instructions: Be precise. Flag all meaningful legal risks clearly.
Frame as risk identification only — not legal advice.
Do NOT return JSON. Return a well-structured markdown document.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
legal.output_format: Professional legal risk analysis report in markdown format.

product.deliverables: Core Deliverable Structure, Modules/Components, Implementation Roadmap, Timeline, Required Assets, Client Journey, Support Model, Risk Mitigation, Scalability Plan, and Versioning Strategy
instructions: Be specific and operational. Include concrete deliverables and timelines.
Do NOT return JSON. Return a well-structured markdown document.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
product.output_format: Professional product strategy report in markdown format.

systems.deliverables: Infrastructure Assessment, Tool Selection, Integration Map, Automation Opportunities, Reliability Plan, Scaling Path, and Implementation Sequence
instructions: Execute infrastructure tasks precisely.
Return only what is explicitly requested. No commentary.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
systems.output_format: Precise systems architecture report in markdown format.

code.deliverables: Production-ready code, implementation notes, and deployment instructions
instructions: Write production code only — no placeholders, no pseudocode.
Include error handling and edge cases.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the code.

voice.deliverables: Script, Tone Guide, Delivery Notes, and Call-to-Action
instructions: Write in the brand voice — direct, authoritative, male-coded.
Do NOT add preamble — start directly with the content.
voice.output_format: Professional voice script in markdown format.
